title: Choose a cloud home for a team
description: Build a practical recommendation for which cloud platform shape best fits a non-technical team's real needs.
whyItMatters: This turns cloud from vague jargon into a reasoned decision process you can explain to other people.

steps.title: Pick a realistic scenario
steps.description: Choose a startup, enterprise team, analytics-heavy company, or internal operations use case.

steps.title: Map the actual job
steps.description: Decide whether the real need is infrastructure breadth, enterprise integration, fast app deployment, or governed data work.

steps.title: Compare the five platforms
steps.description: Use the platform fit matrix to weigh AWS, Azure, GCP, Heroku, and Snowflake against the scenario.

steps.title: Write a recommendation
steps.description: Explain which platform is the primary fit, what trade-offs remain, and what governance questions need answering next.

rubric.description: The recommendation clearly matches the real scenario instead of generic vendor hype.
Upsides, downsides, and governance questions are made explicit.
A non-technical stakeholder could understand the recommendation quickly.
